name: ci-cd
description: CI/CD toolkit — GitHub Actions workflows (Node.js, Go, Python, monorepo, reusable workflows), deployment pipelines (Vercel, Fly.io, Railway, AWS, blue-green, canary, rolling), Docker CI (multi-stage builds, layer caching, vulnerability scanning, multi-arch), release automation (semantic-release, Changesets, GoReleaser, GitHub Releases, changelogs), and CI best practices (caching, parallelism, test sharding, matrix builds, OIDC secrets, concurrency groups). 5 skills, 3 commands, 1 agent. No dependencies.
